ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, meteorologist, public user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Secure hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key string */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the third-party application */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the API key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the API key was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the API key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API access log */,
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API key used for access */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the API was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., data retrieval, data update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the API request */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the API response */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to respond to the API request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_access_logs_api_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("api_key_id") REFERENCES api_keys ("api_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the weather event */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the weather event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the weather event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES weather_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., trend analysis, statistical analysis) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the analysis results are shared with */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_content" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of feedback */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., data backup, system update) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity */,
  "responsible_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for the maintenance activity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the maintenance activity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_maintenance_responsible_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
